body:
this PR allows to have a dynamic viscosity and diffusivity


if a location is specified through the keyword argument `loc` the function will be interpolated automatically, otherwise the function will have `lx, ly, lz` in the signature
```
using Oceananigans.Operators: ζ₃ᶠᶠᶜ, div_xyᶜᶜᶜ, ℑxyᶜᶜᵃ, Azᶜᶜᶜ, Δx, Δy

C₄ = 0.2

@inline function νhb_1(i, j, k, grid, clock, fields, C₄) 

    δ  = div_xyᶜᶜᶜ(i, j, k, grid, fields.u, fields.v)
    ζ  = ℑxyᶜᶜᵃ(i, j, k, grid, ζ₃ᶠᶠᶜ, fields.u, fields.v)
    
    Δ₂ = Azᶜᶜᶜ(i, j, k, grid)
    return C₄ * Δ₂^2 sqrt(δ^2 + ζ^2)
end

@inline function νhb_2(i, j, k, grid, lx, ly, lz, clock, fields, λ) 
    Δ = (1 / (1 / Δx(i, j, k, grid, lx, ly, lz)^2 + 1 / Δy(i, j, k, grid, lx, ly, lz)^2) )^2
    return Δ / λ
end

biharmonic_viscosity_1  = HorizontalScalarBiharmonicDiffusivity(ν=νhb_1, discrete_form=true, loc = (Center, Center, Center), parameters = C₄)
biharmonic_viscosity_2  = HorizontalScalarBiharmonicDiffusivity(ν=νhb_2, discrete_form=true, parameters = 1days)
```
title: Fields in viscosity operators
